nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.
Indian: variant of   Dey  .

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Randall
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (of Norman origin): common colloquial pronunciation of   Randolph  .

variants.name: Randell
meanings: English: variant of   Randall  .
Americanized form of German   Randel  .

variants.name: Randon
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Marcel.
English: probably a variant of Randall , with assimilation of n-l to n-n.
French (northern): from the ancient Germanic personal name Rando, a short form of names based on the element rand ‘rim (of a shield), shield’.

variants.name: Randol
meanings: English: altered form of   Randall  .

variants.name: Randal
meanings: English: variant of   Randall  .
Norwegian: habitational name from the farm name Randal in Gulen, a compound of Old Norse runnr ‘copse, thicket, grove’ + dalr ‘valley’.

variants.name: Randles
meanings: English and Irish (Louth): variant of Randall , with genitival or post-medieval excrescent -s. In Ireland this is sometimes a variant of Reynolds .

variants.name: Randle
meanings: English: variant of   Randall  .
Americanized form of German Randel or of its Bavarian variant Randl.

variants.name: Rendell
meanings: English (Somerset, Devon, and Dorset): variant of   Randall  .

variants.name: Randel
meanings: English: variant of   Randall  .
South German: variant of   Rand   3.

variants.name: Randolph
meanings: English and German: from Randolf, an ancient Germanic personal name composed of the elements rand ‘rim (of a shield), shield’ + wolf ‘wolf’. This was introduced into England by the Normans in Old French forms of two different ancient Germanic personal names which became confused with each other: Randulf (from rand ‘(shield-)edge’ + wulf ‘wolf’) and Rannulf (from hraf(a)n ‘raven’ + wulf ‘wolf’).

History: An American family bearing this surname are descended from William Randolph (c. 1651–1711), a planter and merchant, a member of a family that originally came from Sussex, England. William Randolph emigrated from Warwickshire to VA c. 1673. He was a forebear of Thomas Jefferson and Robert E. Lee. Randolph had seven sons, each of whom inherited an estate, the name of which was sometimes added to their own, such as Sir John Randolph of Tazewell. His great-grandsons included Edmund Randolph (1753–1813), first attorney general of the US and one of the framers of the US Constitution, and the diplomat and statesman John Randolph of Roanoke (1773–1833), who served as US minister to Russia.

variants.name: Rendall
meanings: English: variant of   Randall  .
Scottish: habitational name from Rendall (Orkney), named with a stream-name of uncertain origin + Old Norse dalr ‘valley’.
In some cases possibly also an Americanized form of Swedish   Rendahl  .

nameMeanings.name: Ragnvald
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From the Old Norse personal name Rögnvaldr, from regin ‘advice, decision’ (also, ‘the gods’) + valdr ‘ruler’. Compare Ronald .

en.lifeSummary: Mrs. Ragnvald de Randall was born in 1407, in Møre og Romsdal, Norway. She had at least 1 son with Ragnvald Kolbeinnson av Randall. She died in Trondheim, Sør-Trøndelag, Norway.

fr.lifeSummary: Mrs. Ragnvald de Randall est née en 1407, à Møre og Romsdal, Norvège. Elle a eu au moins 1 fils avec Ragnvald Kolbeinnson av Randall. Elle est décédée à Trondheim, Sør-Trøndelag, Norvège.

de.lifeSummary: Mrs. Ragnvald de Randall wurde 1407 in Møre og Romsdal, Norwegen geboren. Sie hatte mit Ragnvald Kolbeinnson av Randall mindestens 1 Sohn. Sie starb in Trondheim, Sør-Trøndelag, Norwegen.

it.lifeSummary: Mrs. Ragnvald de Randall è nata il nel 1407 nel Møre og Romsdal, Norvegia. Lei avuto almeno 1 figlio con Ragnvald Kolbeinnson av Randall. Morì nel Trondheim, Sør-Trøndelag, Norvegia.

ko.lifeSummary: Mrs. Ragnvald de Randall(은)는 1407년 노르웨이 o르 오그 롬즈다에서 태어났다. 그녀는 Ragnvald Kolbeinnson av Randall(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 노르웨이 스o-트o들라그 트론드하임에서 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Mrs. Ragnvald de Randall nasceu em 1407, em Møre og Romsdal, Noruega. Ela teve pelo menos 1 filho com Ragnvald Kolbeinnson av Randall. Ela faleceu em Trondheim, Sør-Trøndelag, Noruega.

ru.lifeSummary: Mrs. Ragnvald de Randall родилась в 1407 г. в местности мoр ог ромсдаль, Норвегия. У неё был по крайней мере 1 сын от Ragnvald Kolbeinnson av Randall. Она умерла в местности трондхим, сoр-трoнделаг, Норвегия.

es.lifeSummary: Mrs. Ragnvald de Randall nació en 1407, en Møre og Romsdal, Noruega. Tuvo por lo menos 1 hijo con Ragnvald Kolbeinnson av Randall. Murió en Trondheim, Sør-Trøndelag, Noruega.
